empty.title: Empty chart
empty.description: No data in this chart for the selected date range

users.activity: Distribution of activity over the week

alert.title: Disclaimer
alert.description: To protect your privacy, we don't track individual users. This means that some charts show the total number of members across all guilds, which can result in duplicates and does not accurately reflect your bot's real active user count.

alert.title: No data?
alert.description: That's normal, votes requires additional configuration.

empty.title: No custom event created
empty.description: No custom events available, create one to get started.

create.title: Create custom event
create.description: Custom events allow you to create charts for specific features of your bot.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this event?
deleteDialog.descriptionSuffix: and all its associated data. This action cannot be undone.

fields.eventKeyDescription: The unique key you'll use in your code to seed the event.
fields.chartTitleDescription: The chart name you'll see on the dashboard.
fields.defaultModeDescription: Used when no data exists for a given hour.
fields.defaultValueDescription: The value used when no previous hour data exists.

charts.trendUp: Trending up by {percentage}% on this period
charts.trendDown: Trending down by {percentage}% on this period
